## Requirements

- WordPress 6.0+
- WooCommerce 6.0+
- PHP 7.4+

## Installation

1. Download the plugin zip file
2. Go to WordPress Admin > Plugins > Add New > Upload Plugin
3. Upload the zip file and activate

Or install via composer:
```bash
composer require ghdj/swiver-woocommerce
```
